reasoning_content:
Task 3 passes 000_main.sysu.c (simple main returning constant). Now I need to expand the EmitIR to handle more constructs. Let me look at what constructs are needed and what already works.

Looking at the score, the basic case works. Now I need to handle:
1. Variable declarations (VarDecl)
2. DeclRefExpr (referencing variables)
3. BinaryExpr (assignment, arithmetic)
4. UnaryExpr 
5. ImplicitCastExpr
6. DeclStmt, ExprStmt
7. Function calls

Let me check the EmitIR files again and add support for these.

The key issue is that Task 3 reads from the task2 answer JSON (from clang), so the input has all node types regardless of our task2 parser implementation. This is good - I only need to make EmitIR handle all the node types.

Let me implement the missing handlers in EmitIR.
